import React from 'react'; import { useTranslation } from '../hooks/useTranslation'; const Methodologies = () => { const { t } = useTranslation(); const experiences = [ { number: "01", icon: "bi-headset", title_key: "exp_1_title", description_key: "exp_1_text", period_key: "exp_1_period", isCurrent: false }, { number: "02", icon: "bi-code-square", title_key: "exp_2_title", description_key: "exp_2_text", period_key: "exp_2_period", isCurrent: true } ]; return (

{t('journey_title')}

{experiences.map((exp, index) => (
{exp.number}

{t(exp.title_key)}

{t(exp.period_key)} {exp.isCurrent && ( Atual )}

{t(exp.description_key)}

))}
); }; export default Methodologies;
